name: locked-ether
text:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract Exchange (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#263-386) has payable functions:
	 - Exchange.exchange(address,string,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#312-344)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether

name: reentrancy-events
text:
Reentrancy in Wallet.exchange(string,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#491-518):
	External calls:
	- exchange.exchange{value: exchangeAmount}(msg.sender,targetCurrency,targetAddress,maximumRateDelay) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#510-515)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Exchanged(msg.sender,targetCurrency,amount) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#517)

name: reentrancy-events

	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Withdrawn(from,amount) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#639)

name: timestamp
text:
Exchange.exchange(address,string,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#312-344) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(block.timestamp - exchangeRateTime <= maximumRateDelay,Exchange: Rate too old, request new rate) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#329-332)

name: timestamp
text:
Oracle.answerRequest(uint256,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#127-165) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(requests[id].active,Oracle: Request not active) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#129)
	- require(bool,string)(! requests[id].answers[msg.sender],Oracle: Already answered) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#143)
	- requests[id].requestTime < exchangeRateTime[symbol] (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#146)
	- (requests[id].answersCount * 100) / oracleList.length >= minimumQuorum (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#158)
